title: KZ-2 SSOT duplicate validator
objective:
Read governance/AGENT_CONTEXT.md first. Create file governance/validators/validate_ssot_no_duplicates.py with content #!/usr/bin/env python3
from __future__ import annotations
from pathlib import Path

ARTIFACTS=['contours_registry.json','object_passports.json','providers_registry.json','contour_provider_policy.json','provider_failover_policy.json','managed_channel_schema.json','telegram_input_envelope_schema.json','telegram_to_managed_channel_mapping.json']
CANONICAL_DIR=Path('governance/state')
SKIP_PARTS={'.git','archive','__pycache__','node_modules'}

def main()->int:
    errors=[]
    for name in ARTIFACTS:
        matches=[]
        for path in Path('governance').rglob(name):
            if any(part in SKIP_PARTS for part in path.parts):
                continue
            matches.append(path)
        canonical=CANONICAL_DIR/name
        if canonical not in matches:
            errors.append(f'{name}: canonical missing at {canonical}')
        noncanonical=[str(p) for p in matches if p!=canonical]
        if noncanonical:
            errors.append(f'{name}: non-canonical duplicates: '+', '.join(noncanonical))
    if errors:
        print('\n'.join(errors))
        return 1
    print('PASS: no active SSOT duplicates for tracked artifacts')
    return 0

if __name__=='__main__':
    raise SystemExit(main())

Create file governance/state/kz2_ssot_validator_status.json with content {"stage":"KZ-2","status":"validator_created","validator":"governance/validators/validate_ssot_no_duplicates.py","release_pass":false,"next_action":"KZ-2 archive duplicate copies and update refs until validator passes"}
